items.title: Adobe Launches Company-Specific Generative AI Models
items.description: Adobe announced a service that allows businesses to create generative AI models unique to their brand using their own media assets.

items.title: UBS Survey Shows Homeowners Warming to Renovations Again
items.description: More homeowners ready to renovate as confidence improves.

items.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Home Depot, Boeing, Progressive, Frequency Electronics and United Bancorp
items.description: Zacks Analyst Blog spotlights Home Depot, Boeing, Progressive, Frequency Electronics, and United Bancorp for their latest performance and sector outlooks.

items.title: Lowe's Digital Evolution Enhances Pro & DIY Experiences With AI
items.description: LOW advances its "Total Home" strategy with AI tools, boosting Pro and DIY sales, productivity, and digital engagement.

items.title: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
items.description: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.
